title: The Undersea World of Jacques Cousteau
overview: The intrepid undersea explorer and author circles the globe on his floating laboratory, Calypso, in this occasional series. A pioneer in marine study, the red-capped Frenchman introduced generations of landlubbers to the creatures and mysteries of the sea.

episodes.title: The Undersea World of Jacques Cousteau (1976)
